prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Environment Agency in England, which manages environmental permits and regulations, specifically under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED). It does not apply to Scotland, where environmental regulation is handled by the Scottish Environment Protection Agency (SEPA).
